violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fans in produce need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. - Leaking sanitizer in meat dept.
Handwashing lavatories. — --- Meat dept handwash station had parts for grinder in the handwash station.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors in the meat walk-in cooler need to be cleaned.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
